reviews.review_title: It's ok, but needs tweaking a bit.
reviews.review_description:
The idea of this is good and it does work... Sort of.
The interface is VERY basic but functional.
The biggest issues with it are:
Aligning the "virtual" piano is very fiddly, and it doesn't actually align properly. On an 88 key piano, it is like a fraction of a millimeter too small on each key, so you can align it perfectly to one key, but by the time you get to the end, they keys don't align .
While it has easy/medium/hard modes it just throws you in... There's no learning, no training mode...

It has potential, but needs a fair bit of work.
I downloaded songs or midi files on each of the designated websites but none are showing up on the app
WHEN I JUST GO ON TO YOUTUBE AND DO IT LIKE THAT IM TRASH BUT WHEN I GO ON HERE ITS LIKE I GOT A BOOST BECAUSE NOW I CAN DO HARD SONGS LIKE RUSH E AND VLAVDI OR SOMETHING WINTER

I got this app for my 8yo daughter who has a keyboard but doesn't know how to play it. The problem is that there is no beginners mode that you can start from scratch as the easy mode is quite hard for a beginner, especially for a child who is keen to learn how to play.

reviews.review_title: I had no trouble at all.
reviews.review_description: I had no trouble at all with placement and alignment of the keyboard. Just wanted to share that since others say they had trouble.. and im an amateur.. it was simple for me. I like it even better then oianovision so far.

Sure, it needs more quality but it is really helping me play.  I have never played before so this is a big step. I would like to thank the creators for making a magnificent game! This is why ya’ll deserve five stars!😀⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

As much as I like the idea, it needs a bit of work.
Figured out the whole thing and was able to calibrate it with my piano but the VR keyboard doesn't stay calibrated and keeps shifting when you move your head. Pushes the VR keyboard farther left or right and it becomes impossible to hit the right keys

reviews.review_title: Great app!  Works with Yamaha p105
reviews.review_description:
Can’t believe how awesome this is.  Makes me wanna play my piano as it’s a mix of learning/gaming which is motivational for me.  

Thank you for making this free to use!
I’ve been using this app for just 5 minutes, and it’s already amazing! It offers a variety of songs that let you practice at every level.
Learn how to write

Would like to see more midi songs, but I guess you could download additional ones!

Just wondering if it has wireless midi support ”WIDI” so you can connect your midi keyboard wireless? Or do you need to have cable (usb) connection to use a keyboard? 
(cme-pro)
I don't understand sand it
I can not register
This game has helped me learn songs quicker than ever. The virtual keys coming towards me helps know what notes to hit and when to play them. Love the game and love the fact I can import songs.

I just can't believe this is free! It works really well. The only issue I encountered was signing up and logging in. Sometimes if you click the box, the keyboard doesn't work. However, I believe I've found a solution:
When clicking the box, either make sure to press it quickly with the trigger, or press the B button on your controller. If it clicks twice, it will not work.

Calibration - very painful to match the keyboard width/length and no manual controls to adjust yet there are controls for height, rotation, etc. Perhaps an easier way to calibrate would be to pinch one end first and fix one side of the overlay, then stretch and pinch the other end, to ensure that only one end is moving at a time. There’s not enough FOV to see if both ends of the overlay were aligned.

Flat and sharps - these need to be coloured differently as it’s hard to distinguish the flats from plain keys purely based on width. Either an option to make them light shade of green and blue or make them entirely different colour so that they stand out. 

Printed sheet view - doesn’t seem to be an option to zoom it in or to move closer.

That’s all I had the patience to test. As someone who played the piano all their life - it feels it’d be quicker and easier to teach people how to read music instead, unless the above issues are adressed
The calibration piano that you are supposed to play on doesn't even align with my irl piano, unusable

Every time I calibrate so that the virtual keyboard overlay aligns with my piano, then confirm, then try a song, the overlay quickly drifts and becomes incorrect. Pointless. Tried with multiple keyboards and lighting conditions.

Lots of choices, but every time I connect my Keyboard to my headset. It never connects, it says something like “connect Midi device” even though its connected. And when I restart the app and connect my midi again it connects but it won’t detect the keys playing. Pls look into this issue, I see there are a lot of updates, but this hasn’t been fixed

This app is seriously cool! You can actually connect your piano and with the augmented reality it’s super immersive. Minor bugs here and there but it’s pretty good. Whether you're just starting out or want to improve your skills, this app makes learning piano fun and you actually get better, it is like playing guitar hero. Highly recommend!

This app has been really helpful to improve my piano skills. I love how it shows the upcoming notes and offers many options for loops and playbacks. The design has really improved since I started using this app, they clearly want a good user experience. Can’t wait until they are able to add some more modern songs.
